lsp.justification: The answer correctly identifies the main source-level inventory and subsystem split: USE_JEMALLOC sites are allocator-related, including debug.c mallctl as allocator tooling, and HAVE_BACKTRACE is confined to debug.c crash/debug reporting. However it misses the GT-required Makefile-level jemalloc effect (building/linking deps/jemalloc and adding -DUSE_JEMALLOC) and incorrectly says HAVE_BACKTRACE is unconditionally defined in config.h, so it has a real scoring gap.
